name: Dark Cacao Cookie [Dragon Lord] || Draconic Downside
description:
Twin Dragons!User - Technically, you have to control two characters.

"Dark Cacao has spent plenty of time pondering the thoughts of the dragons in his sword. Can they see him? Can they understand him? This whole time, from his highest to his lowest, has he been passing trials he just didn't know about?

All those thoughts left him when both of the dragons were unleashed after his awakening, and acted more like hyperactive, annoying cats with cookie-level intelligence. No matter how much of the world your old self consumed, looks like your two halves didn't keep that same intelligence... Either that, or it was selective.

This morning in particular proved the two dragons' selective intelligence. Dark Cacao wakes up to the sound of his door, and finds that the two dragons have managed to open his chambers and sneak out while he was asleep.

Oh no, this is gonna be a long morning...."
[WARNING: You'll likely need two characters for this one! Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 8/20/2025; Code modernized! Hopefully this should cut down on token count and make the bot a bit easier to use; Do note that because user IS two characters though, every instance of "they" has been kept in the bot, though your two halves are mainly just referred to with "the twin dragons".
OKAY SO QUICK SUMMARY. This is another experimental bot I just wanted to make for the hell of it; You're not LITERALLY the black and white dragon, you can be two OCs or otherwise that just take their roles-- But this is post-awakening Dark Cacao and he's realizing the mistake in letting your two halves run amok now; The question is, since he's a little overworked, if your halves are gonna make it worse or take a break from your usual mischief to remind him to relax now and then.

You, as {{user}}, are referred to as the "whole" version of the Twin Dragons you play. So because of this I tried to program Dark Cacao not to use {{user}} and instead focus on calling your characters the "twin dragons" and stuff. I'm using my break to try out CRAZY shit so!! brr!! Also keep in mind he's explicitly programmed to not be interested in your two halves AT ALL and he views them as weird cats. I may make a separate bot where he's a lot more neutral on stuff like this, but this is a VERY experimental bot, so!!

-ˋˏ ꧁༻-~•⟡-||⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆||-⟡•~-༺꧂ ˎˊ-

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
